description: Fragment from the middle of a legal document. Refers to itself as a taṣāduq. Dating: likely late Mamluk or early Ottoman era. Refers to rings (? khawātim) of tin (qaṣṭīr); scissors (miqaṣṣ); a party who undertakes to watch over these items (wa-ʿalayhi ḥifẓ dhālika wa-ṣawnuhū); the heirs of Sālim; Qāsim; ʿAbd al-Wāḥid b. [...] al-Maghribī al-Ṭarābulusī; Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Muḥammad al-Maghribī al-Salātī (likely the nisba of Salā, i.e., present-day Salé); and a phrase referring to their looking at something (?اطلاعهم على ذلك الاطلاع الشـ[ـرعي] . . .).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
